overview: I am Dhanush Kandhan aka Dhanu from Bengaluru, India. I am an AI engineer, developer, and technologist focused on AI, ethics, GPUs, and emerging systems, while contributing to tech communities and education initiatives. And I love building things & Hosting a Tamil Tech Podcast Idu Namma Tech-u

interests.title: Agent Dev
interests.description: Exploring LLM orchestration and autonomous agentic workflows to build intelligent tools.

interests.title: Podcast
interests.description: Hosting Idunammatechu Tamil podcast, connecting experts and builders through conversations on technology, culture, and ideas.

interests.title: IoT
interests.description: Exploring IoT systems like ESP32, Jetson Nano, Raspberry Pi, Arduino, and custom PCB designs for custom experiments.

interests.title: Open Source & SaaS
interests.description: Contributing to open source projects and building tools & SaaS products for the community & market as well.

interests.title: Art
interests.description: Scribling Pen drawings and lil bit of paintings that made my day.

interests.title: Exploration
interests.description: Adventure travel and nature photography, finding inspiration beyond the digital realm.
